name: Buttermilk Chicken Fried Cutlets
recipeIngredient: 1 pound chicken breast cutlets, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the chicken in half a cup of buttermilk.
2. Dredge the chicken in a mixture of cornmeal, flour, salt, and pepper.
3. Heat two tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat.
4. Add half of the chicken to the pan and cook, turning once, until cooked through, about 6 minutes total.
5. Repeat with the remaining chicken.
6. Remove the chicken from the pan.
7. Add the remaining teaspoon of flour and cook, stirring, for one minute.
8. Whisk together the chicken broth and half a cup of remaining buttermilk into the pan drippings.
9. Simmer, stirring, for two minutes.
10. Season with salt and pepper.
11. Serve gravy over the chicken.
